sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the current state - how many dark gray objects are now
seg = current_frame.segmentation
dark_gray = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
print("Dark gray: %d" % len(dark_gray))
for n in dark_gray:
    print("  pixels=%d boundary=%s" % (n['pixels'], n['boundary']))

green = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print("Green: %d" % len(green))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

</parameter>
